Package microui.core.base

Class Container

java.lang.Object
microui.core.base.View
microui.core.base.SpatialView
microui.core.base.ContentView
microui.core.base.Component
microui.core.base.Container
All Implemented Interfaces:
KeyPressable, Scrollable, Visible
public final class Container extends Component implements KeyPressable, Scrollable
Container component for organizing and managing GUI components. Provides functionality for managing child elements (ContentView) through a layout system (LayoutManager), event handling, and rendering priority management.

The container supports two operation modes: Container.Mode.RESPECT_CONSTRAINTS (respect constraints) and Container.Mode.IGNORE_CONSTRAINTS (ignore constraints). Default mode is RESPECT_CONSTRAINTS.

Implements KeyPressable and Scrollable interfaces to propagate keyboard and scroll events to child components.

Status: STABLE - Do not modify Last Reviewed: 08.11.2025

See Also:
  • ContentView
  • LayoutManager
  • LayoutParams

  • Constructor Details

    • Container

      public Container(LayoutManager layoutManager, float x, float y, float width, float height)
      Constructs a Container with specified layout manager and dimensions.
      Parameters:
      layoutManager - the layout manager to use (cannot be null)
      x - the x-coordinate of the container
      y - the y-coordinate of the container
      width - the width of the container
      height - the height of the container
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if layoutManager is null

    • Container

      public Container(LayoutManager layoutManager)
      Constructs a Container with specified layout manager using default dimensions (full context width and height).
      Parameters:
      layoutManager - the layout manager to use (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if layoutManager is null

      public ContentView getById(int id)

      Returns:

      Throws:

    • add

      public Container add(ContentView contentView, LayoutParams layoutParams, int id)
      Adds a ContentView to the container with specified layout parameters and numeric ID.
      Parameters:
      contentView - the component to add (cannot be null)
      layoutParams - the layout parameters for the component (cannot be null)
      id - the numeric identifier for the component
      Returns:
      this container for method chaining
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if contentView or layoutParams is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if contentView is already added or is the container itself

    • add

      public Container add(ContentView contentView, LayoutParams layoutParams, String textId)
      Adds a ContentView to the container with specified layout parameters and text ID.
      Parameters:
      contentView - the component to add (cannot be null)
      layoutParams - the layout parameters for the component (cannot be null)
      textId - the text identifier for the component (cannot be null)
      Returns:
      this container for method chaining
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if contentView, layoutParams, or textId is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if contentView is already added or is the container itself

    • add

      public Container add(ContentView contentView, LayoutParams layoutParams)
      Adds a ContentView to the container with specified layout parameters.

      Returns:
      this container for method chaining
      Throws:

      IllegalArgumentException - if contentView is already added or is the container itself

    • remove

      public Container remove(ContentView contentView)
      Removes a ContentView from the container.
      Parameters:
      contentView - the component to remove (cannot be null)
      Returns:
      this container for method chaining
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if contentView is null
      NoSuchElementException - if the component is not found in the container

      public Container removeById(int id)

      Returns:
